decisions.summary: PAN-1864's deterministic deacon-side synthesis fix already shipped on origin/main (commit bb57e9f16, verified by flywheel log c73f74f33). Operator-approved re-scope: this issue now adds ONLY the missing AC4 regression test. No production code changes.

Test the PURE exported function synthesizeReviewFromReports (src/lib/cloister/deacon.ts:5939) directly. It takes report bodies in and returns {verdict, topBlocker, body} — no filesystem, no session, no live parent. That inherently satisfies the issue's 'without any live parent' requirement.

Blocker semantics under test (findBlockingFindings, deacon.ts:5926): inside a '## Findings' section, a heading '### ! <title>' or '### ⊗ <title>' is a blocker; 'None' and advisory '###' headings (no !/⊗) do not block. topBlocker format is '[<subRole>] <title>'; passed body line is '## Verdict: APPROVED', blocked body line is '## Verdict: CHANGES REQUESTED — <topBlocker>'.
New test file location: src/lib/cloister/__tests__/deacon-review-synthesis.test.ts (vitest, matches sibling convention).

hazards.summary: deacon.ts is 6000+ lines with heavy module-load side effects; a naive `import { synthesizeReviewFromReports } from '../deacon.js'` can fail or pull in real dependencies.
hazards.mitigation: Copy the vi.mock() import scaffold verbatim from src/lib/cloister/__tests__/deacon-stash-janitor.test.ts (lines 1–138, ~20 mocks) before the import. That sibling proves the import works behind the scaffold.

hazards.summary: findBlockingFindings only inspects the '## Findings' section. A fixture report body without a '## Findings' heading is treated as clean (no blockers), which would make a 'blocker' fixture silently pass.
hazards.mitigation: Every fixture body must contain a '## Findings' section. Put 'None' for clean, '### ! <title>' or '### ⊗ <title>' for a blocker, and a plain '### <title>' for an advisory (non-blocking) note.

hazards.summary: Risk of scope creep into production code — the implementation is shipped and verified; any edit to deacon.ts production logic is wrong here.
hazards.mitigation: Test-only diff. NonGoals forbid touching synthesizeReviewFromReports, findBlockingFindings, or the call site (deacon.ts:6068–6140). Review must block any production change.

sessionHistory.content: Planning re-scoped after discovery found PAN-1864's deterministic-synthesis fix already shipped+verified on origin/main (bb57e9f16). Only the AC4 regression test is missing; operator approved scoping this issue to that single test bead.
sessionHistory.note: Planning session for PAN-1864 — re-scoped to add the missing deterministic-synthesis regression test (AC4).
